title: FSM stuck in IDLE
description: A simple controller FSM remains stuck in IDLE even after start is asserted.
rtl: module controller(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic start, output logic done); typedef enum logic [1:0] {IDLE, BUSY, DONE} state_t; state_t state; always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) state <= IDLE; else if (state == IDLE && start) state = BUSY; else if (state == BUSY) state <= DONE; end assign done = (state == DONE); endmodule
testbench: sequential FSM test expects nonblocking assignments and transition from IDLE to BUSY when start=1
expected_root_cause: blocking assignment used in sequential FSM logic
failure_log:
UVM_ERROR: FSM remained in IDLE after start asserted.
ASSERTION FAILED: expected state transition IDLE -> BUSY.
COVERAGE: 42.0
success_log:
UVM_INFO: All checks passed.
ASSERTION PASSED: expected state transition observed.
COVERAGE: 87.5
